title: Property Executive
description:
Job Summary:

Manage and maintain property and dormitory operations at Punggol Plaza, ensuring compliance with statutory requirements, overseeing contractors and tenant relations, and delivering efficient facility management with 24/7 emergency responsiveness.

Responsibilities:

  • Conduct regular property inspections to assess grounds maintenance and identify improvement opportunities
  • Verify compliance with building statutory requirements to ensure legal and safety standards are met
  • Maintain accurate records and organize filing systems to support administrative efficiency
  • Oversee building cleanliness standards and coordinate cleaning schedules to uphold hygiene
  • Evaluate and recommend replacement or improvement plans for managed facilities to enhance operational quality
  • Supervise and manage term contractors to ensure work aligns with contract specifications and quality expectations
  • Assist in monthly rental collection and leasing activities to support property revenue management
  • Manage vendor contracts to ensure timely delivery and adherence to agreed terms
  • Coordinate tenant management activities including fitting out and renovation projects to facilitate smooth tenancy operations
  • Conduct regular dormitory inspections to monitor housekeeping, cleanliness, safety, and maintenance standards
  • Administer dormitory operations by coordinating room occupancy, resolving worker conflicts, and managing dormitory facilities maintenance
  • Ensure efficient and continuous dormitory operations through proactive management and problem resolution
  • Provide 24/7 emergency call support and attend site promptly to address urgent operational issues

postedCompany.description:
KOUFU, We are a leading F&B company in Singapore looking to fill the following positions to cater to our expansion plans.

 

Koufu was founded in 2002 by Mr Pang Lim, Managing Director. Within a short span of 10 years, Koufu expanded its business profile from neighbourhood coffee shops to establishing large scale modern food courts in residential and well as commercial shopping malls.

 

Koufu has been enhancing its effort to preserve the unique Singaporean coffee shop culture amidst the challenges and rapid changes in our local food and beverage industry. We have managed to transform our organisation through a three-prong strategy in ensuring the "quality", "service" and "environment" factors are covered. Through these effective strategies we managed to create breakthroughs by integrating modern food court and coffee shop management style and contemporary designs.
postedCompany.name: KOUFU PTE LTD

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
